name: Ek Bharat Shreshtha Bharat
description:
Ek Bharat Shreshtha Bharat (EBSB) is a government initiative to promote mutual understanding and bonding among people of different states and cultures. The idea is to strengthen unity in diversity by encouraging engagement between different regions through cultural and educational exchange.

This initiative helps celebrate the diverse yet unified spirit of India.

achievements.title: Module Integration
achievements.desc: Successfully integrated cultural modules into the college's major fests.

achievements.title: Digital Repository
achievements.desc: Built a digital repository of resources for students to learn about the Northeast Indian lifestyle.

achievements.title: Student Engagement
achievements.desc: Maintained a consistent engagement rate of 70% among the student body through awareness campaigns.

events.title: Cultural Fusion Workshop
events.desc: An interactive session demonstrating the traditional art forms and attire of the "Land of the Rising Sun" (Arunachal) and the "Abode of Clouds" (Meghalaya).

events.title: Bhasha Sangram
events.desc: A language-learning initiative where students are taught basic greetings and phrases in Khasi, Garo, and Arunachali dialects.

events.title: EBSB Monthly Debate/Quiz
events.desc: Focused on the history and contributions of our paired states to the Indian identity.
